key_concepts: Recognizing specific pitfalls that often trap beginners.
Applying global normalization scaling on entire datasets before calling train_test_split.
Copying code snippets that mistakenly call fit_transform on validation or inference sets instead of using just transform.
Writing feature calculation functions completely decoupled from the validation architecture framework, relying on manual execution steps.
examples: Using a simple .replace() or .apply() method without creating a transformer class. When the inference script is written two months later, the exact calculation details are forgotten.
exclusions: Keep it to top 3 pipeline feature engineering mistakes, do not list general AI mistakes like overfitting.
